meaning: n.[建]净空,头上空间,净空高度(拱梁等下面)
examples: There's a lot of headroom for such a small car.
The forecabin, with 6ft headroom, also has plenty of room to stand and get dressed.
Countries now have some headroom to borrow.
If you are prepared to sacrifice 3D, then, this provides a lot of interesting developmental headroom.
Mini tablets might complete a takeover of that category, creating headroom for laptop sales to revive.
